title: Toadgang Lore Theory
description: Schema for a single lore theory. Frontmatter must conform; prose sections are free-form markdown.

slug.description: URL-safe unique identifier. Lowercase, hyphens only. Must be unique across all theories.

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the index and README.

category.description: Top-level lore category. Maps to the folder under theories/.

confidence.description: Community confidence score. 0.0 = pure speculation, 1.0 = essentially confirmed.

safety.description: Safety label surfaced to agents and displayed on every theory card.

community_source.description: URL or citation for where this theory originated (Discord thread, tweet, forum post, etc.).

toadgod_signal.description: Optional direct quote, post, or link from the Toadgod that relates to this theory.

tags.description: Optional freeform tags for cross-referencing theories.

related_theories.description: Slugs of theories that connect to or contradict this one.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date of last meaningful edit.

contributors.description: GitHub handles or community names of contributors.
